About

Machines that
think & sense

Engineering identity built at the intersection of mechanical precision and emerging sensor intelligence — plus a strong eye for spatial design.

SolidWorksANSYSRobotics Sensor IntegrationPythonFurniture CADAutomation

I'm a motivated M.Sc. student in the AIMS program at Hochschule Coburg — with 5+ years of industry experience in mechanical design, sensor integration, and automation.

My career began at Inov Robotics designing complete robotic systems — solar panel cleaners, autonomous rooftop bots — and extended to a rich furniture and interior design CAD portfolio covering bedroom suites, TV units, bunk beds, office layouts and bespoke pieces, all modelled in SolidWorks.

Now expanding into electronics and ML: studying automotive electronics, semiconductor devices, photoelectric imaging and machine learning at USST Shanghai.
